expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers OK or Cancel semantics, pending selection state, and dismissal correctness for multi-selection workflows
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly maps each focus area: (1) "Shipment checkpoint covers OK/Cancel semantics" referencing the missing OK button AC; (2) "Pending selection state (selection still loading)" referencing loading/debounce context and Phase 5b checkpoints; (3) "Dismissal correctness" referencing popover dismissal AC/context and Phase 5b rubric expectations. It also includes an explicit expectation check: "Case focus explicitly covered: Yes, at contract level".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as a Phase 5b shipment-checkpoint contract review, cites "review-rubric-phase5b.md" repeatedly, and lists Phase 5b required outputs/artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b) and dispositions. It states: "Output aligns with primary phase phase5b: Yes".
